mapper.select:
select su.id, su.username, su.password, su.name, su.type, su.phone, su.avatar_url, su.additional_info, su.post_id, su.status, sp.name from system_user su left join system_post sp on su.post_id = sp.id and sp.is_deleted = 0
su.is_deleted = 0
and su.name like concat('%',#{queryVo.name},'%')
and su.phone like concat('%',#{queryVo.phone},'%')
